/usr/bin/ar qc ../lib/libscintilla.a CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/AutoComplete.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/CallTip.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/CaseConvert.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/CaseFolder.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/CellBuffer.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/CharacterCategoryMap.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/CharacterType.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/CharClassify.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/ContractionState.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/ChangeHistory.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/DBCS.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/Decoration.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/Document.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/EditModel.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/Editor.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/EditView.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/Indicator.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/KeyMap.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/LineMarker.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/Geometry.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/MarginView.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/PerLine.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/PositionCache.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/RESearch.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/RunStyles.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/ScintillaBase.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/Selection.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/Style.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/UniConversion.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/UniqueString.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/UndoHistory.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/ViewStyle.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/src/XPM.cxx.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/cocoa/ScintillaCocoa.mm.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/cocoa/ScintillaView.mm.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/cocoa/InfoBar.mm.o CMakeFiles/scintilla.dir/cocoa/PlatCocoa.mm.o
/usr/bin/ranlib ../lib/libscintilla.a
